title: Chua Kong Sian
text: Home * People * Chua Kong Sian Chua Kong Sian (Kong Sian), a Singaporean computer scientist affiliated with the National University of Singapore and its former National Supercomputing Research Centre Singapore [1] . As computer chess programmer, Chua Kong Sian is author of Cobalt , primary author of GNU Chess Version 5 [2] , and author of the C++ UCI bitboard-based engine Melee Chess [3] .
